exampleZh: 我得到了英寸。

definition: Having or exerting influence.
example: Jane was very influential in getting the motion passed.
exampleZh: 簡對於這項動議的通過非常有影響力。

definition: An acute contagious disease of the upper airways and lungs, caused by a virus, which rapidly spreads around the world in seasonal epidemics.
example: Influenza makes my whole body ache and leaves me exhausted.
exampleZh: 流感讓我全身酸痛，疲憊不堪。

definition: Not formal or ceremonious.
example: an informal get-together
exampleZh: 非正式的聚會

definition: Break or violate a treaty, a law, a right etc.
example: They infringe on our basic freedoms.
exampleZh: 他們侵犯了我們的基本自由。

definition: A violation or breach, as of a law.
example: Copyright infringement is against the law.
exampleZh: 侵犯版權是違法的。

definition: To live or reside in.
example: The Inuit inhabit the Arctic.
exampleZh: 因紐特人居住在北極。

definition: To take possession of as a right (especially in Biblical translations).
example: Your descendants will inherit the earth.
exampleZh: 你的子孫將繼承這片土地。

definition: Chronologically first, early; of or pertaining to the beginning, cause or origin.
example: Our initial admiration for their efficiency gave way to disgust about their methods.
exampleZh: 我們最初對他們的效率的欽佩後來變成了對他們方法的厭惡。

definition: A beginning; a first move.
example: Tom lacks initiative.
exampleZh: 湯姆缺乏主動性。

definition: The act of injecting, or something that is injected.
example: The troubled business received a much-needed cash injection.
exampleZh: 這家陷入困境的企業獲得了急需的現金注入。

definition: To wound or cause physical harm to a living creature.
example: Robert seemed injured.
exampleZh: 羅伯特看起來受傷了。

definition: Inborn; existing or having existed since birth.
example: innate ideas
exampleZh: 與生俱來的想法

definition: The act of innovating; the introduction of something new, in customs, rites, etc.
example: The others, whose time had been more actively employed, began to shew symptoms of innovation,—"the good wine did its good office." The frost of etiquette, and pride of birth, began to give way before the genial blessings of this benign constellation, and the formal appellatives with which the three dignitaries had hitherto addressed each other, were now familiarly abbreviated into Tully, Bally, and Killie.
exampleZh: 其他人的時間得到了更積極的利用，開始表現出創新的跡象——「好酒發揮了它的作用。」在這個仁慈的星座的親切祝福面前，禮儀的嚴酷和出身的驕傲開始消失，三位貴賓迄今為止互相稱呼的正式稱呼現在被人們熟悉地縮寫為塔利、巴利和基利。

definition: Characterized by the creation of new ideas or inventions.
example: Tom was innovative.
exampleZh: 湯姆很有創新精神。

definition: To have an effect on by using gentle or subtle action; to exert an influence upon; to modify, bias, or sway; to persuade or induce.
example: Feelings influence physical health.
exampleZh: 情緒影響身體健康。

definition: Unable to be separated; bound together permanently.
example: We were practically inseparable.
exampleZh: 我們幾乎形影不離。

definition: Of or pertaining to the inner surface, limit or boundary.
example: The inside surface of the cup is unpainted.
exampleZh: 杯子的內表面未上漆。

definition: To examine critically or carefully; especially, to search out problems or determine condition; to scrutinize.
example: Inspect the system for leaks.
exampleZh: 檢查系統是否有洩漏。

definition: A person employed to inspect something.
example: The inspector interrogated him.
exampleZh: 督察審問了他。

definition: At once; without delay.
example: When the neighbours' dog barked, ours instantly replied with a howl.
exampleZh: 當鄰居的狗吠叫時，我們的狗立即以嚎叫回應。

definition: A natural or inherent impulse or behaviour.
example: Many animals fear fire by instinct.
exampleZh: 許多動物本能地害怕火。

definition: A custom or practice of a society or community.
example: He's been in an institution since the crash.
exampleZh: 自從車禍發生後，他一直在機構裡。

definition: Not sufficient.
example: Insufficient time is available to reflect on the problem
exampleZh: 沒有足夠的時間反思問題

definition: Action or form of speech deliberately intended to be rude; a particular act or statement having this effect.
example: The way the orchestra performed tonight was an insult to my ears.
exampleZh: 樂團今晚的表演方式對我的耳朵來說是一種侮辱。

definition: To form into one whole; to make entire; to complete; to renew; to restore; to perfect.
example: They were keen to integrate their new skills into the performance.
exampleZh: 他們熱衷於將新技能融入表演中。

definition: Belonging to, or performed by, the intellect; mental or cognitive.
example: intellectual powers, activities, etc.
exampleZh: 智力、活動等

definition: Firmly fixed or concentrated on something.
example: a mind intent on self-improvement
exampleZh: 致力於自我提升的思想

definition: Interacting with or communicating with and reacting to each other; influencing or having an effect on each other; acting or capable of acting on each other or with the other.
example: interactive teaching methods
exampleZh: 互動式教學法

definition: To get involved or involve oneself, causing disturbance.
example: I always try not to interfere with other people’s personal affairs.
exampleZh: 我總是盡量不干涉別人的私事。

definition: The inside of a building, container, cavern, or other enclosed structure.
example: Sir Richard Burton explored far into the African interior.
exampleZh: 理查德·伯頓爵士深入非洲內陸進行了探索。

definition: Between two or more people.
example: Systemic violence kills just as surely as interpersonal violence does.
exampleZh: 系統性暴力和人際暴力一樣肯定會造成死亡。

definition: To explain or tell the meaning of; to translate orally into intelligible or familiar language or terms. applied especially to language, but also to dreams, signs, conduct, mysteries, etc.
example: to interpret an Indian speech
exampleZh: 翻譯印度演講

definition: An act of interpreting or explaining what is obscure; a translation; a version; a construction.
example: the interpretation of a dream, or of an enigma.
exampleZh: 對夢或謎的解釋。

definition: One who conveys what a user of one language is saying or signing, in real time or shortly after that person has finished communicating, to a user of a different language. (Contrasted with a translator.)
example: A Japanese man who is tried before a German court is assisted by an interpreter in making oral statements.
exampleZh: 一名日本男子在德國法院受審，在翻譯的協助下進行口頭陳述。

definition: The act or process of putting in; infusion.
example: Input your email address.
exampleZh: 輸入您的電子郵件地址。

definition: The junction of two (or more) paths, streets, highways, or other thoroughfares.
example: What happened at that intersection?
exampleZh: 那個十字路口發生了什麼事？

definition: Closely acquainted; familiar.
example: He and his sister deeply valued their intimate relationship as they didn't have much else to live for.
exampleZh: 他和妹妹非常珍惜他們的親密關係，因為他們沒有太多其他東西可以活下去。

definition: (grammar, of a verb) not transitive: not having, or not taking, a direct object
example: The word "drink" is a transitive verb in "they drink wine", but an intransitive one in "they drink often."
exampleZh: 「drink」一詞在「他們喝葡萄酒」中是及物動詞，但在「他們經常喝酒」中是不及物動詞。

definition: Inside the veins.
example: Get his morphine intravenous started stat!
exampleZh: 開始給他靜脈注射嗎啡！

definition: To thrust oneself in; to come or enter without invitation, permission, or welcome; to encroach; to trespass.
example: to intrude on families at unseasonable hours; to intrude on the lands of another
exampleZh: 在不合時宜的時間打擾家人；侵入他人的土地

definition: Someone who intrudes.
example: Boris killed the intruder.
exampleZh: 鮑里斯殺死了入侵者。

definition: The forcible inclusion or entry of an external group or individual; the act of intruding.
example: He viewed sales calls as an unwelcome intrusion.
exampleZh: 他認為銷售電話是一種不受歡迎的侵入。

definition: Not variable; unalterable; uniform; always having the same value.
example: The French adjective marron (brown) is invariable: it does not take the usual s in the plural.
exampleZh: 法文形容詞 marron（棕色）是不變的：它不採用通常的複數 s。

definition: Every time; always, without change.
example: He is invariably late for meetings.
exampleZh: 他開會總是遲到。

definition: One who invents, either as a hobby or as an occupation.
example: Thomas Edison was a prolific inventor.
exampleZh: 湯瑪斯·愛迪生是一位多產的發明家。

definition: To inquire into or study in order to ascertain facts or information.
example: to investigate the causes of natural phenomena
exampleZh: 研究自然現象的原因

definition: The act of investing, or state of being invested.
example: Giving your children a good education is a wise long-term investment.
exampleZh: 為孩子提供良好的教育是一項明智的長期投資。

definition: A person who invests money in order to make a profit.
example: Ziri became an investor.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為了投資者。

definition: Unable to be seen; out of sight; not visible.
example: I went invisible so that my ex-girlfriend wouldn't send me instant messages.
exampleZh: 我隱身了，這樣我的前女友就不會傳即時訊息給我。

definition: (manner) In an ironic manner; in a way displaying irony.
example: Ironically, the automated checkout system ended up costing more in repairs than the workers it was meant to replace.
exampleZh: 諷刺的是，自動結帳系統最終的維修成本比它要取代的工人還要多。

definition: Not rational; unfounded or nonsensical.
example: an irrational decision
exampleZh: 非理性的決定

definition: Impossile to resist.
example: Yanni finds Skura irresistible.
exampleZh: 雅尼 (Yanni) 發現斯庫拉 (Skura) 難以抗拒。

definition: To teach by giving instructions.
example: Instruct your offspring.
exampleZh: 教導你的後代。

definition: Not responsible; exempt from legal responsibility, not to be held accountable.
example: Sociopaths are irresponsible.
exampleZh: 反社會者是不負責任的。

definition: Experiencing a feeling of irritation.
example: Everyone got irritated.
exampleZh: 每個人都被激怒了。

definition: Causing irritation, annoyance or pain.
example: Tom is irritating.
exampleZh: 湯姆很煩。

definition: The act of irritating or annoying
example: What irritation causes you to be so moody?
exampleZh: 是什麼刺激讓你如此情緒化？

definition: To call upon (a person, a god) for help, assistance or guidance.
example: Once Tom tried to invoke a demon, and he almost succeeded.
exampleZh: 有一次湯姆試圖召喚惡魔，他幾乎成功了。

definition: A sensation felt on an area of the skin that causes a person or animal to want to scratch.
example: My hands itch.
exampleZh: 我的手很癢。

definition: One of the bones, usually bearing teeth, which form the framework of the mouth.
example: His jaw dropped in amazement.
exampleZh: 他驚訝得下巴都掉下來了。

definition: To push slightly; to move or shake with a push or jerk, as to gain the attention of; to jolt.
example: jog one's elbow
exampleZh: 慢跑手肘

definition: The point where two components of a structure join, but are still able to rotate.
example: This rod is free to swing at the joint with the platform.
exampleZh: 該桿在與平台的連接處可以自由擺動。

definition: The activity or profession of being a journalist.
example: Ziri supports independent journalism.
exampleZh: 齊裡支持獨立新聞業。

definition: A Japanese martial art and sport adapted from jujutsu.
example: I wanted to learn judo.
exampleZh: 我想學柔道。

definition: The act of jumping; a leap; a spring; a bound.
example: The boy took a skip and a jump down the lane.
exampleZh: 男孩沿著小巷一蹦一跳。

definition: A member of a jury.
example: The twelfth juror is missing.
exampleZh: 第十二名陪審員失蹤。

definition: A group of individuals chosen from the general population to hear and decide a case in a court of law.
example: Jury selection begins Monday.
exampleZh: 陪審團遴選將於週一開始。

definition: To provide an acceptable explanation for.
example: How can you justify spending so much money on clothes?
exampleZh: 你怎麼能證明花這麼多錢買衣服是合理的呢？

definition: A member of the Macropodidae family of large marsupials with strong hind legs for hopping, native to Australia.
example: The kangaroo jumps very high.
exampleZh: 袋鼠跳得很高。

definition: A form of entertainment popular in clubs, at parties, etc, in which individual members of the public sing along to pre-recorded instrumental versions of popular songs, the lyrics of which are displayed for the singer on a screen in time with the music.
example: Yanni did karaoke with Rima.
exampleZh: 雅尼和里瑪一起唱卡拉OK。

definition: Often with a prepositional phrase, or with to and an infinitive: showing a quick and ardent responsiveness or willingness; eager, enthusiastic, interested.
example: I’m keen on computers.
exampleZh: 我熱衷於電腦。

definition: To get something stuck in a confined space.
example: She took some jam.
exampleZh: 她拿了一些果醬。

definition: A petroleum-based thin and colorless fuel
example: The kerosene lasted all winter, so the furnace kept us always warm.
exampleZh: 煤油可以持續整個冬天，所以爐子總是讓我們保持溫暖。

definition: One who keeps something.
example: The keeper was class today.
exampleZh: 今天守門員上課了。

definition: In the manner of one who knows.
example: She smiled knowingly, but kept the secret.
exampleZh: 她會意地笑了笑，但還是保守了秘密。

definition: Identified as a specific type; famous, renowned.
example: He was a known pickpocket.
exampleZh: 他是一位著名的扒手。

definition: A small ticket or sign giving information about something to which it is attached or intended to be attached.
example: Although the label priced this poster at three pounds, I got it for two.
exampleZh: 雖然這張海報的標籤標價為三英鎊，但我卻花了兩英鎊買了它。

definition: To be without, to need, to require.
example: They lack experience.
exampleZh: 他們缺乏經驗。

definition: Unable to walk properly because of a problem with one's feet or legs.
example: a lame leg, arm or muscle
exampleZh: 腿、手臂或肌肉跛了

definition: To rest on one's bent knees, sometimes only one; to move to such a position.
example: You will kneel.
exampleZh: 你會跪下。

definition: A looping of a piece of string or of any other long, flexible material that cannot be untangled without passing one or both ends of the material through its loops.
example: Tom tightened the knot.
exampleZh: 湯姆拉緊了結。

definition: A female landlord.
example: Yanni strangled his former landlady.
exampleZh: 雅尼勒死了他的前房東。

definition: A natural disaster that involves the breakup and downhill flow of rock, mud, water and anything caught in the path.
example: The candidate won by a landslide.
exampleZh: 候選人以壓倒性優勢獲勝。

definition: The loose part of a coat; the lower part of a garment that plays loosely; a skirt; an apron.
example: The boy was sitting on his mother's lap.
exampleZh: 男孩坐在母親的腿上。

definition: A laptop computer.
example: Jonas closed his laptop.
exampleZh: 喬納斯合上筆記型電腦。

definition: A weapon of war, consisting of a long shaft or handle and a steel blade or head; a spear carried by horsemen.
example: The knight had a blue pennon hanging from the end of his lance.
exampleZh: 騎士的長矛末端掛著一根藍色的三角旗。

definition: A device that produces a monochromatic, coherent beam of light.
example: The scientists used a laser.
exampleZh: 科學家使用了雷射。

definition: (sequence) Used to mark the beginning of the last in a list of items or propositions.
example: Firstly, that's illegal; secondly, it has serious disadvantages; thirdly, it's not necessary; and lastly, did I mention that it's illegal?
exampleZh: 首先，這是非法的；其次，它有嚴重的缺點；第三，它沒有必要；最後，我是否提到它是非法的？

definition: Just before it is too late; in the nick of time.
example: He's a last-minute replacement. After today, they'd have had to play with the original roster.
exampleZh: 他是最後一刻的替補。今天之後，他們將不得不使用原來的陣容進行比賽。

definition: Near the end of a period of time.
example: Santiago later apologized.
exampleZh: 聖地牙哥後來道歉。

definition: Relating to or being the second of two items.
example: The latter half of the film was interesting.
exampleZh: 影片的後半部很有趣。

definition: A laundering; a washing.
example: You've left your dirty laundry all over the house.
exampleZh: 你把髒衣服丟得滿屋子都是。

definition: The molten rock ejected by a volcano from its crater or fissured sides.
example: The volcano vomited lava and flames.
exampleZh: 火山噴出熔岩和火焰。

definition: One who makes or enacts laws.
example: Ricks, 54, is now a lawmaker in the Colorado General Assembly, elected in November 2020.
exampleZh: 里克斯現年 54 歲，現任科羅拉多州議員，於 2020 年 11 月當選。

definition: An open space between woods.
example: The lawn looks wonderful.
exampleZh: 草坪看起來棒極了。

definition: In civil law, a case where two or more people disagree and one or more of the parties take the case to a court for resolution.
example: The lawyer advised his client against filing a lawsuit as it would take a lot of time and money to resolve.
exampleZh: 律師建議他的當事人不要提起訴訟，因為這需要花費大量的時間和金錢來解決。

definition: A lazy person.
example: My father was a good-for-nothing layabout who sat about on his posterior all day and ate potato chips.
exampleZh: 我的父親是個沒出息的遊手好閒者，整天坐著吃薯片。

definition: A crack, crevice, fissure, or hole which admits water or other fluid, or lets it escape.
example: a leak in a boat
exampleZh: 船上漏水

definition: Any of various small, singing passerine birds of the family Alaudidae.
example: Her voice was sweeter than the lark's.
exampleZh: 她的聲音比雲雀的聲音還要甜美。

definition: The act of leaping or jumping.
example: It's quite a leap to claim that those cloud formations are evidence of UFOs.
exampleZh: 聲稱這些雲層是不明飛行物的證據是相當誇張的。

definition: An act in which something is learned.
example: The department head was also a scholar of great learning.
exampleZh: 系主任也是一位博學之士。

definition: (chiefly dialectal) To gather.
example: Yanni vacated the lease.
exampleZh: 雅尼騰出了租約。

definition: A strap, cord or rope with which to restrain an animal, often a dog.
example: Ziri was holding the leash.
exampleZh: 茲裡握著皮帶。

definition: Something of the smallest possible extent; an indivisible unit.
example: It was the least surprising thing.
exampleZh: 這是最不令人驚訝的事。

definition: A person who gives lectures, especially as a profession.
example: Tom is a lecturer.
exampleZh: 湯姆是一名講師。

definition: The vegetable Allium ampeloprasum var. porrum, having edible leaves and an onion-like bulb but with a milder flavour than the onion.
example: The leek is a versatile vegetable that adds flavor to many dishes.
exampleZh: 韭菜是一種用途廣泛的蔬菜，可為許多菜餚增添風味。

definition: An unrealistic story depicting past events.
example: According to the legend on the map, that building is a school.
exampleZh: 根據地圖上的傳說，那棟建築是一所學校。

definition: Of or pertaining to a legend or to legends.
example: The animal kingdom will be legendary!
exampleZh: 動物王國將成為傳奇！

definition: One of the components of a compound leaf.
example: Tom just didn't want to accept the leaflet.
exampleZh: 湯姆只是不想接受傳單。

definition: The act of legislating; preparation and enactment of laws; the laws enacted.
example: Rightists often dislike regulatory legislation.
exampleZh: 右派往往不喜歡監管立法。

definition: Making, or having the power to make, a law or laws; lawmaking
example: Although enormously influential in shaping the laws of the land, The House of Lords are not actually a legislative body.
exampleZh: 儘管上議院在製定國家法律方面具有巨大影響力，但實際上並不是立法機構。

definition: Someone who creates or enacts laws
example: The Prime Minister postponed the legislator's punishment.
exampleZh: 首相推遲了對議員的懲罰。

definition: A governmental body with the power to make, amend and repeal laws.
example: The bill was eviscerated before being passed by the legislature.
exampleZh: 該法案在立法機關通過之前就被刪除了。

definition: In accordance with the law or established legal forms and requirements.
example: legitimate reasoning; a legitimate standard or method
exampleZh: 合理的推理；合法的標準或方法

definition: Characterized by leisure; taking plenty of time; unhurried
example: As we had a free morning, we went on a leisurely walk around the city.
exampleZh: 由於早上空閒，我們就在城市裡悠閒地散步。

definition: Having length; long and overextended, especially in time rather than dimension.
example: She died last night after a lengthy illness.
exampleZh: 她在長期患病後於昨晚去世。

definition: Panthera pardus, a large wild cat with a spotted coat native to Africa and Asia, especially the male of the species (in contrast to leopardess).
example: The leopard looked defensive.
exampleZh: 豹子一臉防禦的樣子。

definition: For fear that; that not; in order to prevent something from happening; in case.
example: He won’t go outside, lest he be eaten by those ravenous eagles.
exampleZh: 他不敢出去，免得被那些貪婪的老鷹吃掉。

definition: To adjust so as to make as flat or perpendicular to the ground as possible.
example: You can level the table by turning the pads that screw into the feet.
exampleZh: 您可以透過轉動旋入腳的墊子來平整桌子。

definition: (now rare outside set phrases) Pertaining to those arts and sciences the study of which is considered to provide general knowledge, as opposed to vocational/occupational, technical or mechanical training.
example: 1983, David Leslie Wagner, The Seven liberal arts in the Middle Ages
exampleZh: 1983，大衛‧萊斯利‧華格納，《中世紀的七門文科》

definition: To incline, deviate, or bend, from a vertical position; to be in a position thus inclining or deviating.
example: Lean forward.
exampleZh: 向前傾身。

definition: A thin skin membrane that covers and moves over an eye.
example: Lower lid before flushing.
exampleZh: 沖水前先放下蓋子。

definition: Inanimate; having no life
example: Boris lied lifeless before Melissa's eyes.
exampleZh: 鮑里斯在梅莉莎眼前毫無生氣地躺著。

definition: The duration of the life of someone or something.
example: I've been waiting a lifetime for a train.
exampleZh: 我等了一輩子的火車。

definition: To make brighter or clearer; to illuminate.
example: to lighten an apartment with lamps or gas; to lighten the streets
exampleZh: 用燈或瓦斯照亮公寓；照亮街道

definition: To make longer, to extend the length of.
example: Being optimistic could lengthen your life, a new study suggests.
exampleZh: 一項新的研究表明，樂觀可以延長你的壽命。

definition: (manner) In a similar manner.
example: Public transportation is virtually inaccessible in this country; likewise, its hospitals are also not very user-friendly.
exampleZh: 這個國家的公共交通幾乎無法到達；同樣，它的醫院也不太人性化。

definition: To stroke with the tongue.
example: Go lick my arsehole!
exampleZh: 去舔我的屁眼吧！

definition: To place (objects) into a line (usually used with "up"); to form into a line; to align.
example: to line troops
exampleZh: 排列部隊

definition: Thread or cloth made from flax fiber.
example: She put the freshly cleaned linens into the linen closet.
exampleZh: 她把剛洗乾淨的床單放進了衣櫃裡。

definition: Someone who fits a lining to something.
example: 1973, A good liner has a pretty shrewd idea of the value of the painting he is treating and usually charges accordingly. — Kyril Bonfiglioli, Don't Point That Thing at Me (Penguin 2001, p. 41)
exampleZh: 1973年，一位優秀的畫師對他所處理的畫作的價值有相當精明的了解，並且通常會相應地收取費用。 — Kyril Bonfiglioli，《別用那個東西指著我》（Penguin 2001，第 41 頁）

definition: Any of various marine food fish, of the genus Molva, resembling the cod.
example: Ling is a Chinese citizen.
exampleZh: 令女士是中國公民。

definition: To stay or remain in a place or situation, especially as if unwilling to depart or not easily able to do so; to loiter.
example: Don't linger.
exampleZh: 別逗留了。

definition: To create or recite a list.
example: to list a door
exampleZh: 列出一扇門

definition: Exactly as stated; read or understood without additional interpretation; according to the letter or verbal expression; real; not figurative or metaphorical.
example: The literal translation is “hands full of bananas” but it means empty-handed.
exampleZh: 直譯是“滿手香蕉”，但它的意思是空手而歸。

definition: Word for word; not figuratively; not as an idiom or metaphor
example: When I saw on the news that there would be no school tomorrow because of the snowstorm, I literally jumped for joy, and hit my head on the ceiling fan.
exampleZh: 當我在新聞上看到因為暴風雪明天不能上學時，我簡直高興得跳了起來，頭撞到了吊扇上。

definition: A platform mounted on two shafts, or a more elaborate construction, designed to be carried by two (or more) people to transport one (in luxury models sometimes more) third person(s) or (occasionally in the elaborate version) a cargo, such as a religious idol.
example: sleep in the litter
exampleZh: 睡在垃圾堆裡

definition: The state of being alive.
example: Respect for the dead does not preclude respect for the living.
exampleZh: 對死者的尊重並不妨礙對生者的尊重。

definition: To put a load on or in (a means of conveyance or a place of storage).
example: The dock workers refused to load the ship.
exampleZh: 碼頭工人拒絕裝船。

definition: An act or instance of lending, an act or instance of granting something for temporary use.
example: Because of the loan that John made to me, I was able to pay my tuition for the upcoming semester.
exampleZh: 由於約翰向我提供的貸款，我能夠支付下學期的學費。

definition: An entryway or reception area; vestibule; passageway; corridor.
example: I had to wait in the lobby for hours before seeing the doctor.
exampleZh: 我不得不在大廳等了幾個小時才去看醫生。

definition: A feeling of depression resulting from being alone or from having no companions.
example: Have you experienced loneliness?
exampleZh: 你經歷過孤獨嗎？

definition: Over a great length or distance.
example: He is a long-distance runner.
exampleZh: 他是一名長跑運動員。

definition: Becoming evident after a relatively long time period.
example: Physical abuse has long-term effects.
exampleZh: 身體虐待會產生長期影響。

definition: In a loose manner.
example: Insert all the bolts loosely, then tighten them.
exampleZh: 鬆動地插入所有螺栓，然後擰緊。

definition: Remarkably bad; of poor quality, dirty, or underhanded; mean, contemptible.
example: No offense, but his cooking is lousy.
exampleZh: 無意冒犯，但他的廚藝很糟糕。

definition: To let descend by its own weight, as something suspended; to let down
example: lower a bucket into a well
exampleZh: 將桶放入井中

definition: Area which is lower than surrounding areas.
example: The lowland region was prone to flooding during the rainy season.
exampleZh: 低地地區在雨季容易發生洪水。

definition: Producing a surplus; profitable.
example: Ancient Berbers developed a lucrative olive oil industry.
exampleZh: 古代柏柏爾人發展了利潤豐厚的橄欖油產業。

definition: Juicy, succulent.
example: That meal was lush! We have to go that restaurant again sometime!
exampleZh: 那頓飯吃得很豐盛！有時間我們一定要再去那家餐廳！

definition: Very fine in quality and comfortable.
example: a luxurious hotel suite
exampleZh: 豪華飯店套房

definition: Very expensive
example: Jonas has lived in luxury.
exampleZh: 喬納斯過著奢侈的生活。

definition: A major appendage of human or animal, used for locomotion (such as an arm, leg or wing).
example: Tom has a prosthetic limb.
exampleZh: 湯姆有一個義肢。

definition: A polite form of address for a woman or lady.
example: Later, Mrs Grey was sitting in her favourite tea shop. “Would madam like the usual cream cakes and patisserie with her tea?” the waitress asked.
exampleZh: 後來，格雷夫人坐在她最喜歡的茶店。 「女士想要普通的奶油蛋糕和糕點配茶嗎？」女服務生問。

definition: A lyric poem.
example: They write lyrics together.
exampleZh: 他們一起寫歌詞。

definition: The state of being mad; insanity; mental disease.
example: Melancholy feeds madness.
exampleZh: 憂鬱助長瘋狂。

definition: A master in some art, especially a composer or conductor.
example: David will have the opportunity to learn from a great maestro.
exampleZh: 大衛將有機會向偉大的大師學習。

definition: A military rank between captain and lieutenant colonel.
example: He used to be a major in the army.
exampleZh: 他曾經是一名陸軍少校。

definition: Brand or kind; model.
example: What make of car do you drive?
exampleZh: 您開什麼牌子的車？

definition: Any ailment or disease of the body; especially, a lingering or deep-seated disorder.
example: The malady of our time is perfectionism.
exampleZh: 我們這個時代的通病是完美主義。

definition: A disease spread by mosquito, in which a protozoan, Plasmodium, multiplies in blood every few days.
example: Those mosquitoes transmit malaria.
exampleZh: 這些蚊子傳播瘧疾。

definition: A tropical Asian fruit tree, Mangifera indica.
example: Tom peeled the mango.
exampleZh: 湯姆剝了芒果皮。

definition: A large house or building, usually built for the wealthy.
example: The mansion seemed abandoned.
exampleZh: 這棟宅邸似乎被遺棄了。

definition: A handbook.
example: The dishwasher isn't working; can you remember where we put the manual?
exampleZh: 洗碗機不工作；你還記得我們把手冊放在哪裡嗎？

definition: The action or process of making goods systematically or on a large scale.
example: to manufacture wool into blankets
exampleZh: 將羊毛製造成毯子

definition: A 42.195 kilometre (26 mile 385 yard) road race.
example: He had a cleaning marathon the night before his girlfriend came over.
exampleZh: 他女朋友來的前一天晚上，他進行了一場清潔馬拉松。

definition: The transformation of raw materials into finished products, usually on a large scale.
example: Algeria needs manufacturing industries.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞需要製造業。

definition: A cover, or partial cover, for the face, used for disguise or protection.
example: a dancer's mask; a fencer's mask; a ball player's mask
exampleZh: 舞者面具；擊劍運動員的面具；球員的面具

definition: (physical) Matter, material.
example: I mass 70 kilograms.
exampleZh: 我體重70公斤。

definition: The killing of a considerable number (usually limited to people) where little or no resistance can be made, with indiscriminate violence, without necessity, and contrary to civilized norms.
example: Did you hear about the massacre?
exampleZh: 你聽過大屠殺嗎？

definition: The action of rubbing, kneading or hitting someone's body, to help the person relax, prepare for muscular action (as in contact sports) or to relieve aches.
example: Having a massage can have many beneficial effects.
exampleZh: 按摩可以產生許多有益的效果。

definition: (massage) A person (especially male) who performs massage.
example: My father is a mayor, and my brother is a masseur.
exampleZh: 我的父親是市長，我的兄弟是按摩師。

definition: Someone who has control over something or someone.
example: Mark Twain was a master of fiction.
exampleZh: 馬克·吐溫是小​​說大師。

definition: The position or authority of a master; dominion; command; supremacy; superiority.
example: Life is a melody composed with supreme art and excellent mastery.
exampleZh: 人生是一首用最高的藝術和精湛的技藝譜寫的旋律。

definition: A fellow, comrade, colleague, partner or someone with whom something is shared, e.g. shipmate, classmate.
example: He's my best mate.
exampleZh: 他是我最好的夥伴。

definition: Of, or relating to mathematics
example: a mathematical problem
exampleZh: 一個數學問題

definition: Fully developed; grown up in terms of physical appearance, behaviour or thinking; ripe.
example: She is quite mature for her age.
exampleZh: 就她的年齡而言，她已經相當成熟了。

definition: A large stately tomb or a building housing such a tomb or several tombs.
example: The Taj Mahal is a mausoleum located in Agra, India.
exampleZh: 泰姬陵是位於印度阿格拉的一座陵墓。

definition: To lament.
example: Does she really mean what she said to him last night?
exampleZh: 她昨晚對他說的話真的是認真的嗎？

definition: Buying and selling in a market.
example: John worked in marketing.
exampleZh: 約翰從事行銷工作。

definition: The middle layer of the wall of a blood vessel or lymph vessel which is composed of connective and muscular tissue.
example: Are social media platforms harmful?
exampleZh: 社群媒體平台有害嗎？

definition: A medicine, or all the medicines regularly taken by a patient.
example: Yanni needed medication.
exampleZh: 雅尼需要藥物治療。

definition: Having no peculiar or outstanding features; not extraordinary, special, exceptional, or great; of medium quality, almost always with a negative connotation.
example: I'm pretty good at tennis but only mediocre at racquetball.
exampleZh: 我網球打得很好，但壁球打得一般。

definition: Tune; sequence of notes that makes up a musical phrase
example: Ziri sang a cheerful melody.
exampleZh: 齊日唱起了快樂的旋律。

definition: Memory; recollection.
example: a memorial building
exampleZh: 一座紀念建築

definition: A wise and trusted counselor or teacher
example: It became a mentor.
exampleZh: 它成為了一位導師。

definition: Commodities offered for sale.
example: good business depends on having good merchandise
exampleZh: 好生意取決於有好商品

definition: Relenting; forbearance to cause or allow harm to another.
example: She took mercy on him and quit embarrassing him.
exampleZh: 她憐憫他，不再讓他難堪。

definition: A piece of work that has been given much critical praise, especially one that is considered the greatest work of a person's career.
example: Sami completed his masterpiece.
exampleZh: 薩米完成了他的傑作。

definition: One that merges.
example: The office has been topsy-turvy since the merger upset everything.
exampleZh: 自從合併擾亂一切以來，辦公室一直亂七八糟。

definition: (transitive, often used with "up") To make untidy or dirty.
example: This doesn't concern you. Don't mess.
exampleZh: 這與你無關。別亂。

definition: One who brings messages.
example: I'll messenger over the signed documents.
exampleZh: 我會把簽署的文件轉達給你。

definition: The use of a word or phrase to refer to something that it is not, invoking a direct similarity between the word or phrase used and the thing described (but in the case of English without the words like or as, since use of those words would imply a simile); the word or phrase used in this way; an implied comparison.
example: desktop metaphor; wastebasket metaphor
exampleZh: 桌面隱喻；廢紙簍隱喻

definition: (now chiefly in the plural) A method or course of action used to achieve some result.
example: Karma means destiny.
exampleZh: 業力意味著命運。

definition: (gaming slang) micromanagement
example: At the micro level he was a good manager. At the macro level he failed.
exampleZh: 從微觀層面來看，他是一位優秀的管理者。在宏觀層面上他失敗了。

definition: Any microorganism, but especially a harmful bacterium.
example: David Paige says it is important not to contaminate Mars with a microbe that could spread.
exampleZh: 大衛佩奇表示，重要的是不要讓可能傳播的微生物污染火星。

definition: A computer designed around a microprocessor, smaller than a minicomputer or a mainframe.
example: The engineer designed a custom microcomputer to control the laboratory equipment.
exampleZh: 工程師設計了一台客製化的微型電腦來控制實驗室設備。

definition: To combine into a whole.
example: Ziri tried to merge into that lane.
exampleZh: 齊裡試圖併入那條車道。

definition: A device (transducer) used to convert sound waves into a varying electric current; normally fed into an amplifier and either recorded or broadcast.
example: Switch off the microphone.
exampleZh: 關閉麥克風。

definition: An optical instrument used for observing small objects.
example: Marija bought a microscope.
exampleZh: 瑪麗亞買了一台顯微鏡。

definition: Of, or relating to microscopes or microscopy; microscopal
example: We supply all microscopic stains and other materials.
exampleZh: 我們提供所有微觀污漬和其他材料。

definition: An electromagnetic wave with wavelength between that of infrared light and radio waves.
example: Luis sanitized the microwave.
exampleZh: 路易斯對微波爐進行了消毒。

definition: A place in the middle of something; may be used of a literal or metaphorical location.
example: You are walking in the midst of snares.
exampleZh: 你正走在網羅之中。

definition: Very strong; possessing might.
example: He's a mighty wrestler, but you are faster than him.
exampleZh: 他是一位強大的摔角手，但你比他更快。

definition: An instance of moving to live in another place for a while.
example: The migration of lead from a can to the food inside it can cause lead poisoning.
exampleZh: 鉛從罐頭遷移到罐內食物會導致鉛中毒。

definition: A grinding apparatus for substances such as grains, seeds, etc.
example: Pepper has a stronger flavor when it is ground straight from a mill.
exampleZh: 直接從磨坊中磨碎的胡椒具有更濃鬱的味道。

definition: (strictly) A person whose net worth is at or greater than one million units of the local currency, but less than two million.
example: Ziri became a millionaire.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為百萬富翁。

definition: A person who practices mimicry, or mime.
example: The alien was trying to mimic a human being.
exampleZh: 外星人試圖模仿人類。

definition: My; belonging to me; that which belongs to me.
example: Mine are better.
exampleZh: 我的更好。

definition: Smaller than normal.
example: I find miniature dogs annoying; they seem to yap more than full-size dogs.
exampleZh: 我覺得迷你狗很煩人；它們的叫聲似乎比全尺寸的狗還要多。

definition: A person who is trained to preach, to perform religious ceremonies, and to afford pastoral care at a Protestant church.
example: The minister said a prayer on behalf of the entire congregation.
exampleZh: 牧師代表全體會眾做了禱告。

definition: A building or institution where money (originally, only coins) is produced under government licence.
example: It must have cost a mint to produce!
exampleZh: 製作起來一定要花不少錢！

definition: A mistaken belief, a wrong idea
example: He had the misconception that the word "misconception" meant becoming pregnant with a girl.
exampleZh: 他誤以為「誤會」這個詞就是懷女孩的意思。

definition: Bad luck
example: It was my fortune, or misfortune, to be called to the office of Chief Executive without any previous political training. - Ulysses S. Grant
exampleZh: 我在沒有任何政治訓練的情況下就被任命為行政長官，這對我來說是幸運，也可以說是不幸。 ——尤利西斯·S·格蘭特

definition: Of or relating to the metric system of measurement.
example: Conversion to the metric system was opposed by tool manufacturers.
exampleZh: 工具製造商反對轉換為公制。

definition: An organism that is too small to be seen by the unaided eye, especially a single-celled organism, such as a bacterium.
example: Tom succeeded in culturing the new microorganism.
exampleZh: 湯姆成功培養了這種新微生物。

definition: Water or other liquid finely suspended in air.
example: It was difficult to see through the morning mist.
exampleZh: 透過晨霧很難看清東西。

definition: Deceptive or tending to mislead or create a false impression.
example: He repeated misleading allegations.
exampleZh: 他重複了誤導性的指控。

definition: Having mistrust, lacking trust (in someone or something).
example: I'm not mistrustful; I'm simply cautious.
exampleZh: 我並非不信任；我只是很謹慎。

definition: To understand incorrectly, while believing one has understood correctly.
example: Did I misunderstand again?
exampleZh: 我是不是又誤會了？

definition: To stir together.
example: Mix the eggs and milk with the flour until the consistency is smooth.
exampleZh: 將雞蛋和牛奶與麵粉混合，直到變得光滑。

definition: The act of mixing.
example: A teaspoonful of the mixture to be taken three times daily after meals
exampleZh: 一茶匙混合物，每日三次，飯後服用

definition: Any object used as a weapon by being thrown or fired through the air, such as stone, arrow or bullet.
example: Algeria has sophisticated missile systems.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞擁有先進的飛彈系統。

definition: Imitation, not genuine; fake.
example: mock leather
exampleZh: 仿皮

definition: Not bragging or boasting about oneself or one's achievements; unpretentious, humble.
example: He earns a modest amount of money.
exampleZh: 他賺的錢不多。

definition: The form of existence belonging to a particular object, entity etc.; a mode of being.
example: Jim's modification to the radio's tuning resulted in clearer sound.
exampleZh: 吉姆對收音機的調音進行了修改，聲音更加清晰。

definition: A rich or powerful person; a magnate.
example: a Silicon Valley tech mogul
exampleZh: 矽谷科技大亨

definition: (manner) In a momentary manner; for a moment or instant.
example: This plane will be landing at Idlewild Airport momentarily.
exampleZh: 這架飛機即將降落在艾德懷德機場。

definition: Lasting for only a moment.
example: Victory attained by violence is tantamount to a defeat, for it is momentary.
exampleZh: 以暴力取得的勝利就等於失敗，因為它是暫時的。

definition: Building for housing monks or others who have taken religious vows
example: The structure was originally a monastery.
exampleZh: 該建築最初是一座修道院。

definition: Given to sudden or frequent changes of mind; temperamental.
example: Tom seemed moody.
exampleZh: 湯姆看起來情緒低落。

definition: (sometimes attributive) The light reflected from the Moon.
example: Moonlight streamed through the windows.
exampleZh: 月光透過窗戶灑進來。

definition: Of or relating to principles of right and wrong in behaviour, especially for teaching right behaviour.
example: moral judgments;  a moral poem
exampleZh: 道德判斷；  一首道德詩

definition: Recognition of the distinction between good and evil or between right and wrong; respect for and obedience to the rules of right conduct; the mental disposition or characteristic of behaving in a manner intended to produce morally good results.
example: Morality is subjective.
exampleZh: 道德是主觀的。

definition: In terms of morals or ethics.
example: Morally, it is a difficult issue to deal with.
exampleZh: 從道德上來說，這是一個很難處理的問題。

definition: Susceptible to death by aging, sickness, injury, or wound; not immortal.
example: mortal enemy
exampleZh: 死敵

definition: A mixture of lime or cement, sand and water used for bonding building blocks.
example: At least three children were injured in a mortar attack on Monday.
exampleZh: 週一，至少三名兒童在迫擊砲襲擊中受傷。

definition: A special form of secured loan where the purpose of the loan must be specified to the lender, to purchase assets that must be fixed (not movable) property, such as a house or piece of farm land. The assets are registered as the legal property of the borrower but the lender can seize them and dispose of them if they are not satisfied with the manner in which the repayment of the loan is conducted by the borrower. Once the loan is fully repaid, the lender loses this right of seizure and the assets are then deemed to be unencumbered.
example: We're renting a property in the city centre because we can't afford to get a mortgage yet.
exampleZh: 我們在市中心租了一間房子，因為我們還付不起抵押貸款。

definition: The mother of one's spouse.
example: My mother-in-law was hospitalized.
exampleZh: 我的婆婆住院了。

definition: A state of progression from one place to another.
example: The motion to amend is now open for discussion.
exampleZh: 修正案動議現已開放討論。

definition: Enthusiastic, especially about striving toward a goal.
example: We're looking for a highly motivated individual who will fit into our fast-paced corporate culture.
exampleZh: 我們正在尋找一位積極進取、能夠融入我們快節奏的企業文化的個人。

definition: One who drives a motor vehicle.
example: A passing motorist stopped to render aid.
exampleZh: 一名路過的駕駛人停下來提供援助。

definition: A hill or mountain.
example: the mount of Jupiter
exampleZh: 木星山

definition: Filled with grief or sadness; being in a state in which one mourns.
example: You're so mournful.
exampleZh: 你真是太悲傷了

definition: Someone who or something that moves.
example: A steam turbine is a prime mover in which steam at high velocity impinges upon the blades of a rotating element, thus transforming energy of the steam into mechanical energy.
exampleZh: 蒸汽渦輪機是一種原動機，其中蒸汽高速撞擊旋轉元件的葉片，從而將蒸汽的能量轉化為機械能。

definition: That moves or move.
example: moving pictures
exampleZh: 動態圖片

definition: Covered with or full of mud or wet soil.
example: He slogged across the muddy field.
exampleZh: 他艱難地走過泥濘的田野。

definition: More than one (followed by plural).
example: My Swiss Army knife has multiple blades.
exampleZh: 我的瑞士軍刀有多個刀片。

definition: To increase the amount, degree or number of (something).
example: when you multiply 3 by 7, you get 21;  he multiplied several numbers
exampleZh: 3乘以7，得到21；  他把幾個數字相乘

definition: A quiet or unintelligible vocalization; a low tone of voice.
example: All I could hear was a mumble from the next room.
exampleZh: 我只能聽到隔壁房間傳來的咕噥聲。

definition: Any low, indistinct sound, like that of running water.
example: A murmur arose from the audience.
exampleZh: 觀眾席上響起一陣竊竊私語。

definition: A source of inspiration.
example: I let my muse inspire me.
exampleZh: 我讓我的繆斯啟發我。

definition: A stage performance, show or film that involves singing, dancing and musical numbers performed by the cast as well as acting.
example: musical proportion; musical instruments
exampleZh: 音樂比例；樂器

definition: Changeable, dynamic, evolutive; inclined to change, evolve, mutate.
example: Mutable objects can be changed after initialization; immutable objects cannot.
exampleZh: 可變物件在初始化後可以更改；不可變物件則不能。

definition: A repressed or obscure utterance; an instance of muttering.
example: The prisoners were docile, and accepted their lot with barely a mutter.
exampleZh: 囚犯們都很溫順，幾乎沒有嘀咕一聲就接受了自己的命運。

definition: The flesh of sheep used as food.
example: We are getting mutton stew for dinner.
exampleZh: 我們晚餐要燉羊肉。

definition: To thoroughly confuse, befuddle, or bewilder.
example: Solar eclipses continued to mystify ancient humans for thousands of years.
exampleZh: 數千年來，日食一直讓古代人類感到神秘。

definition: Nanotechnology.
example: Nano-science is the study of extremely small objects.
exampleZh: 奈米科學是對極小物體的研究。

definition: Having an inflated idea of one's own importance.
example: Sociopaths are narcissistic.
exampleZh: 反社會者是自戀的。

definition: One who narrates or tells stories.
example: This narrator is really good.
exampleZh: 這個解說真是好。

definition: In a narrow manner; without flexibility or latitude.
example: They regarded the new idea rather narrowly.
exampleZh: 他們對這個新想法的看法相當狹隘。

definition: Extending throughout an entire nation.
example: There was a nationwide search on for the bankrobbers.
exampleZh: 全國正在搜尋銀行搶匪。

definition: Mischievous; tending to misbehave or act badly (especially of a child).
example: Some naughty boys at school hid the teacher's lesson notes.
exampleZh: 學校裡一些頑皮的男孩藏起了老師的課堂筆記。

definition: Of or relating to a navy.
example: naval architect
exampleZh: 海軍建築師

definition: The theory, practice and technology of charting a course for a ship, aircraft or spaceship or (colloquially) road vehicle.
example: Filter navigation items.
exampleZh: 過濾導航項目。

definition: A country's entire sea force, including ships and personnel.
example: Navy officers wear white uniforms.
exampleZh: 海軍軍官穿著白色制服。

definition: Clean, tidy; free from dirt or impurities.
example: My room is neat because I tidied it this morning.  She has very neat hair.
exampleZh: 我的房間很整潔，因為我今天早上整理過。  她的頭髮非常整齊。

definition: Inevitably; of necessity.
example: It is not necessarily true that children get their morals from their parents.
exampleZh: 孩子的道德不一定是從父母那裡遺傳的。

definition: The quality or state of being necessary, unavoidable, or absolutely requisite.
example: I bought a new table out of necessity. My old one was ruined.
exampleZh: 出於需要，我買了一張新桌子。我的舊的已經毀了。

definition: A motorcycle.
example: The motorbike has broken down.
exampleZh: 摩托車壞了。

definition: Not needed; unnecessary.
example: This new project of yours will only be a needless expense.
exampleZh: 你的這個新專案只會是不必要的開支。

definition: In need; poor.
example: Needy people want to give too, but have few material goods to offer.
exampleZh: 有需要的人也想給予，但物質上卻很少。

definition: To plan, control and record the position and course of a vehicle, ship, aircraft, etc., on a journey; to follow a planned course.
example: Communication helps navigate differences.
exampleZh: 溝通有助於化解分歧。

definition: The act of neglecting.
example: to neglect duty or business;  to neglect to pay debts
exampleZh: 玩忽職守或疏忽職守；  忽視償還債務

definition: Similarly not.
example: Just as you would not correct it, neither would I.
exampleZh: 正如你不會糾正它一樣，我也不會。

definition: A requirement for something; something needed.
example: We need weapons.
exampleZh: 我們需要武器。

definition: A bundle of neurons with their connective tissue sheaths, blood vessels and lymphatics.
example: The nerves can be seen through the skin.
exampleZh: 透過皮膚可以看到神經。

definition: In a nervous manner; feeling or displaying nervousness.
example: He paced nervously as he waited for the important phone call.
exampleZh: 他緊張地踱著步，等待著重要的電話。

definition: A mental disorder, less severe than psychosis, marked by anxiety or fear which differ from normal measures by their intensity, which disorder results from a failure to compromise or properly adjust during the developmental stages of life, between normal human instinctual impulses and the demands of human society.
example: Neurosis is a trait often stereotypically assigned to Ashkenazi Jews.
exampleZh: 神經症通常是德系猶太人的典型特徵。

definition: One who delivers the news for broadcast on television, radio, etc; a newsreader.
example: The newscaster is reporting about a girl who was hit by a car.
exampleZh: 新聞播報員正在報道一名女孩被車撞的事件。

definition: Interesting enough to be reported as a news
example: Silence him before he uncovers anything newsworthy.
exampleZh: 在他發現任何有新聞價值的事情之前讓他閉嘴。

definition: The one that follows after this one.
example: Next, please, don't hold up the queue!
exampleZh: 接下來，請不要排隊！

definition: Fastidiously; carefully.
example: Play nicely.
exampleZh: 玩得好。

definition: A demon or monster, thought to plague people while they slept and cause a feeling of suffocation and terror during sleep.
example: I had a nightmare that I tried to run but could neither move nor breathe.
exampleZh: 我做了一個惡夢，我試著逃跑，但既無法動彈，也無法呼吸。

definition: A noble or privileged social class, historically accompanied by a hereditary title; aristocracy.
example: Your kindness and your nobility are known everywhere.
exampleZh: 您的善良和您的高貴舉世聞名。

definition: Having honorable qualities; having moral eminence and freedom from anything petty, mean or dubious in conduct and character.
example: He is a noble man who would never put his family in jeopardy.
exampleZh: 他是個高尚的人，永遠不會讓自己的家人陷入危險。

definition: A peer; an aristocrat; ranks range from baron to king to emperor.
example: But these jovial sounds fell sadly on the ear of the ruined nobleman.
exampleZh: 但這些歡快的聲音卻悲傷地落在這位破產貴族的耳中。

definition: A bundle of neurons with their connective tissue sheaths, blood vessels and lymphatics.
example: Tom has some nerve.
exampleZh: 湯姆還有點膽量。

definition: A member of a society or class who herd animals from pasture to pasture with no fixed home.
example: Tom was a nomad.
exampleZh: 湯姆是個游牧民族。

definition: An act or instance of nominating.
example: Tom lost the nomination.
exampleZh: 湯姆失去了提名。

definition: A person named, or designated, by another, to any office, duty, or position; one nominated, or proposed, by others for office or for election to office.
example: She has been a nominee on five occasions, three of them in consecutive years.
exampleZh: 她曾五度獲得提名，其中連續三年獲得提名。

definition: Having restrictions on smoking.
example: We want a table in the non-smoking sector.
exampleZh: 我們想要一張位於無菸區的桌子。

definition: Towards the north; in a northerly direction.
example: There is a gradual cline of decreasing size to the northward.
exampleZh: 向北有一個逐漸減少的斜坡。

definition: Either of the two orifices located on the nose (or on the beak of a bird); used as a passage for air and other gases to travel the nasal passages.
example: There is a pea in my right nostril.
exampleZh: 我的右鼻孔裡有一顆豌豆。

definition: Nothing; something which does not exist.
example: 0.4 — nought point four / zero point four
exampleZh: 0.4 — 零點四/零點四

definition: To feed and cause to grow; to supply with matter which increases bulk or supplies waste, and promotes health; to furnish with nutriment.
example: to nourish rebellion
exampleZh: 滋養叛逆

definition: The state of being new or novel; newness.
example: Some people prefer conformity, while others seek novelty.
exampleZh: 有些人喜歡從眾，有些人則追求新奇。

definition: Since, because, in light of the fact; often with that.
example: Now that we're all here, let's start the meeting.
exampleZh: 現在我們都到齊了，讓我們開始會議吧。

definition: A minor annoyance or inconvenience.
example: a public nuisance
exampleZh: 公害

definition: A place where nursing or the raising of children is carried on.
example: Commerce is the nursery of seamen.
exampleZh: 商業是海員的搖籃。

definition: A public or private establishment that is open late at night to provide entertainment, food, drink, music and/or dancing.
example: Sami enjoyed the nightclub scene.
exampleZh: 薩米很喜歡夜總會的場景。

definition: The shell that surrounds the kernel of a nut.
example: Toki Pona is an attempt to interpret the meaning of life in a nutshell.
exampleZh: Toki Pona 是對生命意義的嘗試。

definition: A solemn pledge or promise, appealing to a deity, a ruler, or another entity (not necessarily present) to attest to the truth of a statement or sincerity of one's desire to fulfill a contract or promise.
example: After taking the oath of office, she became the country's forty-third premier.
exampleZh: 宣誓就職後，她成為該國第四十三任總理。

definition: The quality of being obedient.
example: Obedience is essential in any army.
exampleZh: 服從對任何軍隊都是至關重要的。

definition: Willing to comply with the commands, orders, or instructions of those in authority.
example: Jessica was so intensely obedient of her parents that her brother sometimes thought she was a robot.
exampleZh: 傑西卡非常服從她的父母，以至於她的哥哥有時認為她是一個機器人。

definition: To do as ordered by (a person, institution etc), to act according to the bidding of.
example: Obey reason.
exampleZh: 服從理性。

definition: A brief notice of a person’s death, as published in a newspaper.
example: Tom Jackson's obituary said that he was born in Australia.
exampleZh: 湯姆傑克森的訃聞稱他出生於澳洲。

definition: To disagree with or oppose something or someone; (especially in a Court of Law) to raise an objection.
example: I object to the proposal to build a new airport terminal.
exampleZh: 我反對興建新機場航站樓的提議。

definition: Of or relating to a material object, actual existence or reality.
example: Be objective.
exampleZh: 保持客觀。

definition: The act of binding oneself by a social, legal, or moral tie to someone.
example: X shall be entitled to subcontract its obligation to provide the Support Services. <>
exampleZh: X 有權分包其提供支援服務的義務。 <>

definition: To incline the head up and down, as to indicate agreement.
example: Did you nod?
exampleZh: 你點頭了嗎？

definition: Prone to cause obsession.
example: The idea is too tempting, it's obsessive.
exampleZh: 這個想法太誘人了，讓人著迷。

definition: Differing from what is usual, ordinary or expected.
example: She slept in, which was very odd.
exampleZh: 她睡懶覺了，這很奇怪。

definition: To hurt the feelings of; to displease; to make angry; to insult.
example: Your accusations offend me deeply.
exampleZh: 你的指控深深地冒犯了我。

definition: Right away, immediately, without thinking about it.
example: Offhand, I'd guess that that's a yellow-bellied sapsucker.
exampleZh: 乍一看，我猜那是一隻黃腹吸盤魚。

definition: An office holder invested with powers and authorities.
example: David Barnes was the official charged with the running of the sports club.
exampleZh: 大衛·巴恩斯是負責體育俱樂部運作的官員。

definition: Moving away from the shore.
example: an offshore oil rig
exampleZh: 海上石油鑽井平台

definition: A viscous preparation of oils and/or fats, usually containing medication, used as a treatment or as an emollient.
example: This kind of ointment prevents sunburn.
exampleZh: 這種藥膏可以防止曬傷。

definition: A tree, Olea europaea, cultivated since ancient times in the Mediterranean for its fruit and the oil obtained from it.
example: a beef olive
exampleZh: 牛肉橄欖

definition: A period of four years, by which the ancient Greeks reckoned time, being the interval from one celebration of the Olympic games to another, beginning with the victory of Corbus in the foot race, which took place in the year 776 BC; as, the era of the olympiads.
example: A student from our school won the city mathematics olympiad.
exampleZh: 我校一名學生榮獲市立數學奧林匹克競賽冠軍。

definition: As soon as; when; after.
example: Once he is married, he will be able to claim the inheritance.
exampleZh: 一旦結婚，他就可以繼承遺產。

definition: One who operates.
example: In the sentence "What did Bill say he wants to buy?", "what" is an operator, binding a phonetically empty variable.
exampleZh: 在「Bill 說他想買什麼？」這句話中，「what」是一個運算符，綁定了一個語音空變數。

definition: A tendency to expect the best, or at least, a favourable outcome
example: I love her youth, her beauty and above all her optimism that everything will turn out fine.
exampleZh: 我愛她的青春、她的美麗，最重要的是她對一切都會好起來的樂觀態度。

definition: A person who expects a favourable outcome
example: Be an optimist.
exampleZh: 做一個樂觀主義者。

definition: Expecting the best in all possible ways.
example: in an optimistic mood
exampleZh: 樂觀的心情

definition: Not compulsory; left to personal choice; elective.
example: On that beach clothing is entirely optional.
exampleZh: 在海灘上，衣服是完全可選的。

definition: Relating to the mouth.
example: oral hygiene
exampleZh: 口腔衛生

definition: Someone who orates or delivers an oration.
example: After a two hour speech everyone was tired of the soapbox orator.
exampleZh: 經過兩個小時的演講，每個人都厭倦了肥皂劇演講者。

definition: Relating to an orchestra or to music played by an orchestra.
example: The singing and the orchestral accompaniment are gradually becoming louder.
exampleZh: 歌聲和管弦樂的伴奏聲逐漸變大。

definition: A plant of the orchid family (Orchidaceae), bearing unusually-shaped flowers of beautiful colours.
example: What a beautiful orchid!
exampleZh: 多麼美麗的蘭花啊！

definition: An object or other creation (e.g. narrative work) from which all later copies and variations are derived
example: This manuscript is the original.
exampleZh: 此手稿為原稿。

definition: The quality of being original or novel.
example: I find originality important.
exampleZh: 我發現原創性很重要。

definition: As it was in the beginning.
example: Originally, this paper was white, but over the years it has yellowed with age.
exampleZh: 這張紙原本是白色的，但隨著時間的推移，它已經泛黃了。

definition: An element of decoration; that which embellishes or adorns.
example: We will ornament the windows with trim to make the room seem brighter.
exampleZh: 我們會用飾條裝飾窗戶，讓房間看起來更明亮。

definition: An avoirdupois ounce, weighing 1/16 of an avoirdupois pound, or 28.3495 grams.
example: He didn't feel even an ounce of regret for his actions.
exampleZh: 對於自己的行為，他沒有半點後悔。

definition: The most remote and desolate areas of Australia; the desert and areas too arid for growing crops.
example: Layla was stuck in the Australian outback.
exampleZh: 萊拉被困在澳洲內陸地區。

definition: An eruption; the sudden appearance of a rash, disease, etc.
example: Any epidemic outbreak causes understandable panic.
exampleZh: 任何流行病的爆發都會引起可以理解的恐慌。

definition: That which is produced or occurs as a result of an event or process.
example: A quality automobile is the outcome of the work of skilled engineers and thousands of workers.
exampleZh: 高品質的汽車是熟練工程師和數千名工人工作的成果。

definition: To excel; go beyond in performance; surpass.
example: Artificial Intelligence can now outdo humans in words and graphics.
exampleZh: 人工智慧現在可以在文字和圖形方面超越人類。

definition: A set of clothing (with accessories).
example: She wore a fashionable outfit with matching purse and shoes.
exampleZh: 她穿著一套時尚的服裝，搭配相配的皮夾和鞋子。

definition: One who opposes another; one who works or takes a position against someone or something; one who attempts to stop the progress of someone or something.
example: She underestimated her opponent.
exampleZh: 她低估了對手。

definition: A vent or similar passage to allow the escape of something.
example: What a perfect outlet for my creativity!
exampleZh: 這是我發揮創意的完美出口！

definition: A line marking the boundary of an object figure.
example: the outline of a speech
exampleZh: 演講大綱

definition: To live longer than; continue to live after the death of; overlive; survive.
example: Wives usually outlive husbands.
exampleZh: 妻子通常比丈夫長壽。

definition: A place from which something can be viewed.
example: Perched on the edge of the cliff was a hidden outlook.
exampleZh: 懸崖邊有一個隱藏的景觀。

definition: A patient who receives treatment at a hospital or clinic but is not admitted overnight; a receiver of ambulatory care.
example: Larry is participating in an outpatient treatment program.
exampleZh: 拉里正在參加門診治療計畫。

definition: Production; quantity produced, created, or completed.
example: The factory increased its output this year.
exampleZh: 今年工廠增加了產量。

definition: A pleasure trip or excursion.
example: Outing closeted, gay celebrities is a controversial practice.
exampleZh: 同性戀名人出櫃是一種有爭議的做法。

definition: Violating morality or decency; provoking indignation or affront.
example: That sounds outrageous.
exampleZh: 這聽起來很離譜。

definition: To shine brighter than something else
example: Sami hoped to outshine his siblings by doing well at school.
exampleZh: 薩米希望在學校表現出色，從而超越他的兄弟姐妹。

definition: Of or pertaining to the outer surface, limit or boundary.
example: The outside surface looks good.
exampleZh: 外表面看起來不錯。

definition: To become too big in size or too mature in age or outlook to continue to want, need, use, experience, or accept some object, practice, condition, belief, etc.
example: Ziri's ivy outgrow its pot.
exampleZh: 齊裡的常春藤長得超出了花盆的大小。

definition: The area surrounding a city or town; suburb.
example: He lived on the outskirts of Paris for a time.
exampleZh: 他曾在巴黎郊區居住過一段時間。

definition: Externally or on the outside, or on the surface.
example: The terrorist was outwardly a bank clerk.
exampleZh: 恐怖分子表面上是一名銀行職員。

definition: Having the shape of an oval.
example: oval conceptions
exampleZh: 橢圓形構想

definition: All-encompassing, all around.
example: Overall, there is not enough evidence to form a clear conclusion.
exampleZh: 整體而言，沒有足夠的證據來得出明確的結論。

definition: Over the edge; especially, off or outside of a boat.
example: It was their practice to throw the scraps overboard.
exampleZh: 他們的做法是把殘渣丟到船外。

definition: A heavy garment worn over other clothes, for protection from cold or weather.
example: Tom found his old overcoat.
exampleZh: 湯姆找到了他的舊大衣。

definition: To judge or calculate too highly.
example: You overestimate their importance.
exampleZh: 你高估了它們的重要性。

definition: To hear something that was not meant for one's ears.
example: Tom made sure nobody could overhear us.
exampleZh: 湯姆確保沒有人能偷聽我們說話。

definition: Something that overlaps or is overlapped
example: Fish scales overlap each other like the tiles on a roof.
exampleZh: 魚鱗像屋頂上的瓦片一樣相互重疊。

definition: To an excessive degree.
example: Parents can be overly protective of their children.
exampleZh: 父母可能會對孩子過度保護。

definition: Abroad.
example: Overseas branches of the company are doing well.
exampleZh: 本公司海外分公司經營狀況良好。

definition: To obscure something by casting a shadow.
example: I never intended to overshadow her accomplishments.
exampleZh: 我從來沒有想過要掩蓋她的成就。

definition: Larger than normal
example: Skura was wearing an oversize Kabyle dress.
exampleZh: 斯庫拉穿著一件超大尺寸的卡比爾連身裙。

definition: To go too far beyond (a limit); especially, to cross boundaries or exceed norms or conventions.
example: Don't overstep my boundaries.
exampleZh: 不要超越我的界限。

definition: To bring about the downfall of (a government, etc.), especially by force.
example: I hate the current government, but not enough to want to overthrow them.
exampleZh: 我討厭現任政府，但還不足以想推翻他們。

definition: To pass a more slowly moving object or entity.
example: Supply will soon overtake demand.
exampleZh: 供應很快就會超過需求。

definition: Exceeding regular working hours.
example: Workers are usually paid extra for working overtime.
exampleZh: 工人通常會因加班而獲得額外報酬。

definition: An expression of one's own physical pain.
example: Ow, ow! I bit my tongue!
exampleZh: 噢，噢！我咬到舌頭了！

definition: An adult castrated male of cattle (B. taurus).
example: The farmer harnessed the ox for work.
exampleZh: 農夫給牛套上挽具去工作。

definition: Any of various birds of prey of the order Strigiformes that are primarily nocturnal and have forward-looking, binocular vision, limited eye movement, and good hearing.
example: Owl chicks are cute.
exampleZh: 貓頭鷹小雞很可愛。

definition: Put into a package.
example: packed lunch
exampleZh: 盒裝午餐

definition: Father, papa.
example: Even the stadium's PA announcer couldn't whip up the atmosphere.
exampleZh: 就連體育場的廣播播報員也無法煽動氣氛。

definition: An allotrope of oxygen (symbol O₃) having three atoms in the molecule instead of the usual two; it is a blue gas, generated from oxygen by electrical discharge.
example: The ozone layer continues to be further destroyed every year.
exampleZh: 臭氧層每年都繼續受到進一步破壞。

definition: A small pack or package; a little bundle or parcel
example: Don't throw the crisp packet on the floor!
exampleZh: 不要將薯片包丟在地板上！

definition: A thin brush for applying paint.
example: Mary put down her paintbrush.
exampleZh: 瑪麗放下畫筆。

definition: A flattened mass of anything soft, to sit or lie on.
example: Welcome to my bachelor pad.
exampleZh: 歡迎來到我的單身公寓。

definition: A portable platform, usually designed to be easily moved by a forklift, on which goods can be stacked, for transport or storage.
example: Saturday, a search plane spotted debris, including a wooden shipping pallet, although it was not clear whether the pallet came from a passing ship.
exampleZh: 週六，一架搜索飛機發現了殘骸，其中包括一個木製運輸托盤，但尚不清楚該托盤是否來自一艘路過的船隻。

definition: Of a disease: epidemic over a wide geographical area and affecting a large proportion of the population; also, of or pertaining to a disease of this nature.
example: World War I might have continued indefinitely if not for a pandemic outbreak of influenza.
exampleZh: 如果不是流感大流行，第一次世界大戰可能會無限期地持續下去。

definition: A (usually) rectangular section of a surface, or of a covering or of a wall, fence etc.
example: Behind the picture was a panel on the wall.
exampleZh: 照片後面是牆上的一塊面板。

definition: To feel overwhelming fear.
example: I developed panic disorder.
exampleZh: 我患上了恐慌症。

definition: Routine work involving written documents
example: The paperwork was legible.
exampleZh: 文件清晰可見。

definition: An organized procession consisting of a series of consecutive displays, performances, exhibits, etc. displayed by moving down a street past a crowd of spectators.
example: The floats and horses in the parade were impressive, but the marching bands were really amazing.
exampleZh: 遊行中的花車和馬匹令人印象深刻，但遊行樂隊確實令人驚嘆。

definition: A tropical American evergreen tree, Carica papaya, having large, yellow, edible fruit
example: Would you like mango, apples and papaya?
exampleZh: 您想要芒果、蘋果和木瓜嗎？

definition: The complete loss of voluntary control of part of a person's body, such as one or more limbs.
example: The government has been in a paralysis since it lost its majority in the parliament.
exampleZh: 自從失去議會多數席次以來，政府一直處於癱瘓狀態。

definition: An apparently self-contradictory statement, which can only be true if it is false, and vice versa.
example: "This sentence is false" is a paradox.
exampleZh: 「這句話是假的」是一個悖論。

definition: An individual trained to medically stabilize people through various interventions, victims of trauma or medical events outside of a hospital setting and preparing them for transport to a medical facility.
example: Ziri became a paramedic.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為護理人員。

definition: A formal council summoned (especially by a monarch) to discuss important issues.
example: Following the general election, Jane Doe took her oath of office as a member of the nation's fifth parliament.
exampleZh: 大選後，簡·多伊宣誓就任美國第五屆國會議員。

definition: A type of soldier who is trained to enter combat zones by parachuting from aircraft.
example: Who is the first female paratrooper in Bangladesh?
exampleZh: 誰是孟加拉第一位女傘兵？

definition: Without paper.
example: The paperless walls of the bedroom looked grey and cheerless.
exampleZh: 臥室裡無紙的牆壁顯得灰暗、陰沉。

definition: To leave the company of.
example: to part the curtains
exampleZh: 拉開窗簾

definition: Pertaining only to a part of something; partial.
example: I couldn't find the particular model you asked for, but I hope this one will do.
exampleZh: 我找不到您要求的特定型號，但我希望這個能找到。

definition: A very small piece of matter, a fragment; especially, the smallest possible part of something.
example: Sami was working on a particle accelerator.
exampleZh: 薩米正在研究粒子加速器。

definition: An adherent to a party or faction.
example: partisan officer, partisan corps
exampleZh: 遊擊隊軍官、遊擊隊

definition: The state of being associated with a partner.
example: He believes sex strengthens partnership dynamics.
exampleZh: 他相信性可以增強夥伴關係的活力。

definition: A shepherd; someone who tends to a flock of animals.
example: Sami visited the pastor.
exampleZh: 薩米拜訪了牧師。

definition: Of or pertaining to shepherds or herders of other livestock
example: We were living a pastoral life.
exampleZh: 我們過著田園生活。

definition: In a passionate manner.
example: They kissed passionately.
exampleZh: 他們熱烈地接吻。

definition: Given to strong feeling, sometimes romantic, sexual, or both.
example: Tom was passionate.
exampleZh: 湯姆很熱情。

definition: A person who loves and zealously supports and defends their country.
example: As a patriot, no.
exampleZh: 作為一個愛國者，不。

definition: Inspired by or showing patriotism; done out of love of one's country; zealously and unselfishly devoted to the service of one's country
example: a patriotic song
exampleZh: 一首愛國歌曲

definition: A piece of cloth, or other suitable material, sewed or otherwise fixed upon a garment to repair or strengthen it, especially upon an old garment to cover a hole.
example: Lorenzo went to the pumpkin patch.
exampleZh: 洛倫佐去了南瓜田。

definition: In a patient manner.
example: Dmitri waited patiently.
exampleZh: 德米特里耐心地等待著。

definition: Love of one's country; devotion to the welfare of one's compatriots; passion which inspires one to serve one's country.
example: Patriotism is overrated.
exampleZh: 愛國主義被高估了。

definition: One who protects or supports; a defender or advocate.
example: I'm your patron.
exampleZh: 我是你的贊助人。

definition: (now chiefly in technical contexts) A paved surface; a hard covering on the ground.
example: Careful! The pavement is slippery.
exampleZh: 小心！人行道很滑。

definition: The soft foot of a mammal or other animal, generally a quadruped, that has claws or nails; comparable to a human hand or foot.
example: You stepped on his paw.
exampleZh: 你踩到了他的爪子。

definition: The act of paying.
example: Payment went through successfully.
exampleZh: 付款成功。

definition: A person who makes monetary loans at interest, taking personal property as security – which may be sold if not redeemed.
example: Ziri became a pawnbroker.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為了當舖。

definition: The business premises of a pawnbroker; where loans are made, with personal property as security
example: Never turn down expensive gifts. Love comes and goes, but the pawnshop is always open.
exampleZh: 永遠不要拒絕昂貴的禮物。愛情來了又去，但當舖永遠開著。

definition: A point; the sharp end or top of anything that terminates in a point; as, the peak, or front, of a cap.
example: The stock market reached a peak in September 1929.
exampleZh: 1929 年 9 月，股市達到高峰。

definition: A shelly concretion, usually rounded, and having a brilliant luster, with varying tints, found in the mantle, or between the mantle and shell, of certain bivalve mollusks, especially in the pearl oysters and river mussels, and sometimes in certain univalves. It is usually due to a secretion of shelly substance around some irritating foreign particle. Its substance is the same as nacre, or mother-of-pearl. Round lustrous pearls are used in jewellery.
example: to pearl barley
exampleZh: 珍珠大麥

definition: In a peaceful manner.
example: They ate peacefully.
exampleZh: 他們平靜地吃著飯。

definition: A small stone, especially one rounded by the action of water.
example: Brazilian pebble
exampleZh: 巴西卵石

definition: A tree (Prunus persica), native to China and now widely cultivated throughout temperate regions, having pink flowers and edible fruit.
example: This peach is juicy.
exampleZh: 這個桃子多汁。

definition: Of or intended for those who are walking.
example: pedestrian crossing
exampleZh: 行人穿越道

definition: A lever operated by one's foot that is used to control or power a machine or mechanism, such as a bicycle or piano
example: I broke the clutch pedal.
exampleZh: 我把離合器踏板弄壞了。

definition: Like a pedant, overly concerned with formal rules and trivial points of learning.
example: Vanya is even more pedantic than I am.
exampleZh: 萬尼亞比我還迂腐。

definition: A quiet sound, particularly one from a baby bird.
example: I don't want to hear a peep out of you!
exampleZh: 我不想聽到你的任何聲音！

definition: (usually uncountable) The skin or outer layer of a fruit, vegetable, etc.
example: Peel the breadfruit.
exampleZh: 麵包果去皮。

definition: To urinate.
example: Do chickens pee?
exampleZh: 雞會撒尿嗎？

definition: A legal sentence.
example: The penalty for his crime was to do hard labor.
exampleZh: 對他的罪行的懲罰是做苦役。

definition: A cylindrical wooden or metal object used to fasten or as a bearing between objects.
example: Hang your coat on the peg and come in.
exampleZh: 把你的外套掛在衣鉤上然後進來。

definition: A look; a glance.
example: Tom gave into peer pressure.
exampleZh: 湯姆屈服於同儕壓力。

definition: To enter into; to make way into the interior of; to pierce.
example: Gustavo tried to penetrate Rima.
exampleZh: 古斯塔沃試圖穿透利瑪。

definition: An annuity paid regularly as benefit due to a retired employee, serviceman etc. in consideration of past services, originally and chiefly by a government but also by various private pension schemes.
example: Many old people depend on their pension to pay the bills.
exampleZh: 許多老年人依靠養老金來支付帳單。

definition: Any of several flightless sea birds, of order Sphenisciformes, found in the Southern Hemisphere, marked by their usual upright stance, walking on short legs, and (generally) their stark black and white plumage.
example: Leave this penguin alone.
exampleZh: 別管這隻企鵝了。

definition: Any of a group of narrow-spectrum antibiotics obtained from Penicillium molds or synthesized; they have a beta-lactam structure; most are active against gram-positive bacteria and used in the treatment of various infections and diseases.
example: I am allergic to aspirin, penicillin, and sulfa drugs.
exampleZh: 我對阿斯匹靈、青黴素和磺胺類藥物過敏。

definition: The amount, number or rate of something, regarded as part of a total of 100; a part of a whole.
example: A high percentage of secondary school leavers take a gap year.
exampleZh: 很大比例的中學畢業生會選擇間隔年。

definition: A polygon with five sides and five angles.
example: I've identified several vulnerabilities in the Pentagon's security.
exampleZh: 我發現了五角大廈安全方面的幾個漏洞。

definition: To become aware of, through the physical senses or by thinking; to see; to understand.
example: I think cats perceive other dimensions.
exampleZh: 我認為貓能感知其他維度。

definition: The organisation, identification and interpretation of sensory information.
example: Is reality shaped by perception?
exampleZh: 現實是由感知塑造的嗎？

definition: To pass through the pores or interstices of; to penetrate and pass through without causing rupture or displacement; applied especially to fluids which pass through substances of loose texture
example: Hatred seems to permeate every corner of society these days.
exampleZh: 如今，仇恨似乎滲透到社會的各個角落。

definition: The property of being persistent.
example: You've got to admire his persistence. He's asked her out every day for a month even though she keeps turning him down.
exampleZh: 你不得不佩服他的堅持。一個月來，他每天都約她出去，儘管她一直拒絕他。

definition: Obstinately refusing to give up or let go.
example: She has had a persistent cough for weeks.
exampleZh: 她已經持續咳嗽數週了。

definition: A person, thing or name typifying a certain quality or idea; an embodiment or exemplification.
example: Adolf Hitler was the personification of anti-Semitism.
exampleZh: 阿道夫·希特勒是反猶太主義的化身。

definition: To be an example of; to have all the attributes of.
example: Mozart could be said to personify musical genius.
exampleZh: 莫札特可以說是音樂天才的化身。

definition: A view, vista or outlook.
example: a perspective drawing
exampleZh: 透視圖

definition: Continuing in a course of action without regard to discouragement, opposition or previous failure.
example: Perseverance has surprising effects.
exampleZh: 堅持不懈會產生意想不到的效果。

definition: Employees; office staff.
example: Edmundo was in an armored personnel carrier.
exampleZh: 埃德蒙多坐在一輛裝甲運兵車裡。

definition: The act of persuading, or trying to do so; the addressing of arguments to someone with the intention of changing their mind or convincing them of a certain point of view, course of action etc.
example: It is his persuasion that abortion should never be condoned.
exampleZh: 他堅信墮胎永遠不該被縱容。

definition: Marked by pessimism and little hopefulness; expecting the worst.
example: a pessimistic view of the future
exampleZh: 對未來的悲觀看法

definition: (usually in the plural) A little schoolboy, either in grade or size.
example: a petty fault
exampleZh: 一個小錯誤

definition: The action or process of perspiring.
example: Tom's forehead was covered with perspiration.
exampleZh: 湯姆的額頭上全是汗。

definition: Extremely afraid.
example: Sami looked petrified.
exampleZh: 薩米看起來驚呆了。

definition: A photometric unit of illuminance, or luminous flux through an area (symbol ph).
example: A water sample is taken to learn about pH.
exampleZh: 採集水樣本以了解 pH 值。

definition: A professional who dispenses prescription drugs in a hospital or retail pharmacy.
example: Ziri became a pharmacist.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為一名藥劑師。

definition: Of, or pertaining to, philosophy.
example: He explores philosophical questions.
exampleZh: 他探索哲學問題。

definition: The 16th letter of the Classical and Modern Greek alphabets and the seventeenth in Old Greek.
example: In computing, pi characters may be entered with special key combinations.
exampleZh: 在計算中，可以使用特殊的組合鍵來輸入 pi 字元。

definition: A practitioner of physic, i.e. a specialist in internal medicine, especially as opposed to a surgeon; a practitioner who treats with medication rather than with surgery.
example: Physician, heal thyself.
exampleZh: 醫生，治癒你自己吧。

definition: A cucumber preserved in a solution, usually a brine or a vinegar syrup.
example: A pickle goes well with a hamburger.
exampleZh: 泡菜和漢堡很搭。

definition: Fussy; particular; demanding to have things just right.
example: I am very picky about the way my kitchen is laid out.
exampleZh: 我對廚房的佈局非常挑剔。

definition: Resembling or worthy of a picture or painting; having the qualities of a picture or painting; pleasingly beautiful.
example: picturesque language
exampleZh: 如詩如畫的語言

definition: To represent in or with a picture.
example: There was a picture hanging above the fireplace.
exampleZh: 壁爐上方掛著一幅畫。

definition: A washable, easily removable cloth cover for pillows.
example: Tom took the pillowcase off the pillow.
exampleZh: 湯姆把枕頭套從枕頭上取下來。

definition: Any coniferous tree of the genus Pinus.
example: The northern slopes were covered mainly in pine.
exampleZh: 北坡主要覆蓋著松樹。

definition: A needle without an eye (usually) made of drawn-out steel wire with one end sharpened and the other flattened or rounded into a head, used for fastening.
example: Pull the pin out of the grenade before throwing it at the enemy.
exampleZh: 在將手榴彈扔向敵人之前，將其從手榴彈中拔出。

definition: A unit of volume, equivalent to:
example: She reached for her pint.
exampleZh: 她伸手去拿她的品脫啤酒。

definition: Robbery at sea, a violation of international law; taking a ship away from the control of those who are legally entitled to it.
example: How should the international community respond to Somali piracy?
exampleZh: 國際社會應如何應對索馬利亞海盜行為？

definition: A sticky, gummy substance secreted by trees; sap.
example: It is hard to get this pitch off my hand.
exampleZh: 很難把這個球從我手中拿走。

definition: A criminal who plunders at sea; commonly attacking merchant vessels, though often pillaging port towns.
example: Yanni is a pirate.
exampleZh: 雅尼是一名海盜。

definition: Action of the verb to plan.
example: My neighbours were going to build an extension but they didn't get planning.
exampleZh: 我的鄰居打算擴建，但他們沒有進行規劃。

definition: (often used with the, sometimes capitalized: the Plague) The bubonic plague, the pestilent disease caused by the virulent bacterium Yersinia pestis.
example: Plague doctors wore beaked masks.
exampleZh: 瘟疫醫生戴著鳥嘴面具。

definition: To present (an argument or a plea), especially in a legal case.
example: The defendant has decided to plead not guilty.
exampleZh: 被告決定不認罪。

definition: A companion for someone (especially a child) to play with.
example: It is not safe, I hear, to play tricks with kings: just as lions sometimes come quietly to someone that rubs them, they are still lions when they choose, and then their playmate will lie dead.
exampleZh: 我聽說，和國王玩把戲是不安全的：就像獅子有時會悄悄地靠近那些摩擦它們的人一樣，當它們選擇時，它們仍然是獅子，然後它們的玩伴就會死去。

definition: An instance of plucking.
example: Those tiny birds are hardly worth the tedious pluck.
exampleZh: 那些小鳥根本不值得費力去採摘。

definition: (authorship) The course of a story, comprising a series of incidents which are gradually unfolded, sometimes by unexpected means.
example: The assassination of Lincoln was part of a larger plot.
exampleZh: 暗殺林肯是一個更大陰謀的一部分。

definition: Of a dark bluish-red colour.
example: She landed a plum position as an executive for the firm.
exampleZh: 她在公司獲得了一個不錯的高階主管職位。

definition: To stop with a plug; to make tight by stopping a hole.
example: He attempted to plug the leaks with some caulk.
exampleZh: 他試著用一些填縫劑堵住漏洞。

definition: A writer and creator of theatrical plays.
example: A student visited the great playwright's house.
exampleZh: 一位學生參觀了這位偉大劇作家的家。

definition: One who works in or with lead.
example: Tom called the plumber.
exampleZh: 湯姆打電話給水管工。

definition: A positive quantity.
example: He is a real plus to the team.
exampleZh: 他對球隊來說是一個真正的優勢。

definition: An acute or chronic inflammation of the lungs caused by viruses, bacteria or other microorganisms, or sometimes by physical or chemical irritants.
example: I was diagnosed with pneumonia.
exampleZh: 我被診斷出患有肺炎。

definition: Having no point or sharp tip; terminating squarely or in a rounded end.
example: a pointless knife
exampleZh: 毫無意義的刀

definition: A substance used to polish.
example: A good silver polish will remove tarnish easily.
exampleZh: 好的銀拋光劑可以輕鬆去除鏽跡。

definition: To use poison to kill or paralyse (somebody).
example: Edmundo drank poison.
exampleZh: 埃德蒙多喝了毒藥。

definition: In a political manner
example: The decision was politically risky, but he believed it was right.
exampleZh: 這個決定有政治風險，但他相信這是正確的。

definition: A sufferer from poliomyelitis.
example: The polio vaccine was first produced by an American scientist.
exampleZh: 小兒麻痺疫苗首先是由一位美國科學家生產出來的。

definition: An organizational structure of the government of a state, church, etc.
example: Maratha polity consisted of a decentralised confederacy of various states.
exampleZh: 馬拉塔政體由各國的分散聯盟組成。

definition: A ball game where two teams of players on horseback use long-handled mallets to propel the ball along the ground and into their opponent's goal.
example: Does Tom play water polo?
exampleZh: 湯姆打水球嗎？

definition: The quality or state of being popular; especially, the state of being esteemed by, or of being in favor with, the people at large
example: Politicians are rarely known for their popularity.
exampleZh: 政治家很少因其受歡迎程度而聞名。

definition: To make a pop, or sharp, quick sound.
example: Watch the balloon pop!
exampleZh: 觀看氣球爆炸！

definition: To wonder, think of deeply
example: I'll ponder it.
exampleZh: 我會考慮的。

definition: Common cold, head cold; catarrh.
example: May I pose another question?
exampleZh: 我可以再問一個問題嗎？

definition: A covered and enclosed entrance to a building, whether taken from the interior, and forming a sort of vestibule within the main wall, or projecting without and with a separate roof.
example: David stayed on his porch.
exampleZh: 大衛留在他的門廊上。

definition: Associated with the upper classes.
example: She talks with a posh accent.
exampleZh: 她說話帶著時髦的口音。

definition: Relating to the collection, sorting and delivery of mail.
example: for all your postal needs
exampleZh: 滿足您所有的郵政需求

definition: Controlled by evil spirits.
example: He was exorcised because he was thought to be possessed by the Devil.
exampleZh: 他被驅魔，因為人們認為他被魔鬼附身了。

definition: An allocated amount.
example: Everybody gets their portion.
exampleZh: 每個人都拿到自己的一份。

definition: Possessing strength.
example: a potent argument
exampleZh: 有力的論據

definition: A unit of mass equal to 16 avoirdupois ounces (= 453.592 37 g). Today this value is the most common meaning of "pound" as a unit of weight.
example: the Rhode Island pound; the New Hampshire pound
exampleZh: 羅德島鎊；新罕布夏鎊

definition: The fine particles which are the result of reducing dry substance by pounding, grinding, or triturating, or the result of decay; dust.
example: to powder one's hair
exampleZh: 搽粉

definition: Existing in possibility, not in actuality.
example: Even from a young age it was clear that she had the potential to become a great musician.
exampleZh: 即使從很小的時候起，她就很明顯地有成為偉大音樂家的潛力。

definition: In a manner showing much potential; with the possibility of happening in a given way.
example: Tobias was potentially dangerous.
exampleZh: 托比亞斯有潛在的危險。

definition: Commendation; favourable representation in words
example: Be sure to praise Bobby for his excellent work at school this week.
exampleZh: 一定要讚揚鮑比本週在學校的出色表現。

definition: In practice; in effect. Not necessarily officially the case but what actually occurs.
example: He was practically uneducated, barely able to read and write a simple sentence.
exampleZh: 他幾乎沒有受過教育，幾乎不能讀和寫一個簡單的句子。

definition: A crustacean of the suborder Dendrobranchiata.
example: She's a prawn!
exampleZh: 她是一隻蝦！

definition: (manner) In a precise manner; exactly.
example: I always try to express myself precisely.
exampleZh: 我總是試著準確地表達自己。

definition: A prancing movement.
example: Don't prance about. Sit down and pay attention.
exampleZh: 別亂蹦亂跳。坐下來注意。
